name: CINTAS CORP
summary: Cintas Corporation provides uniform rental and facility services, first aid and safety products, fire protection services, and uniform direct sales to over one million businesses primarily in the U.S., Canada, and Latin America. Products and services include uniforms, mats, mops, shop towels, restroom supplies, workplace water services, first aid products, eye-wash stations, safety training, fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems, and alarm testing.

products.name: Uniform Rental and Facility Services
products.description: Rental and servicing of uniforms, flame resistant clothing, mats, mops, shop towels, restroom cleaning services and supplies.

products.name: First Aid and Safety Services
products.description: First aid and safety products and services, as well as workplace water services.

products.name: Fire Protection Services
products.description: Fire extinguishers, sprinkler systems, and alarm testing services.

products.name: Uniform Direct Sale
products.description: Direct sale of uniforms and related items from catalogs to customers.

products.name: Safety Training
products.description: Workplace safety training programs for customers.

products.name: Eye-wash Stations
products.description: Eye-wash station products provided to workplace customers.
